title: Coordinator
description: Highly customizible compass hud element based on a bossbar!
body:
Highly customizible compass hud element based on a bossbar!

![bossbar preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3d264e6337da939de378a0d2a6a631da295e6c7.png)

Fully translatible design, editible player data and much more!

Player setting gui accesible by "/cr" command:

![GUI preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14c558920f59fe0fd2e377af2215a271aaef3525.png)

Bugs and ideas can be discused using github issues or on our support discord server!
